title: DeepInfra 登陆 Hugging Face 推理提供商 🔥
title_en: DeepInfra on Hugging Face Inference Providers 🔥
summary: DeepInfra 现已作为 Hugging Face 推理提供商之一上线，用户可通过统一的 Hugging Face API 调用 DeepInfra 托管的多种开源模型（如 Llama、Mistral 等），实现低延迟、高吞吐的推理服务。这一集成简化了模型部署流程，使开发者无需管理底层基础设施即可快速使用高性能推理。DeepInfra is now available as one of the Hugging Face Inference Providers, allowing users to access various open-source models hosted by DeepInfra (e.g., Llama, Mistral) via a unified Hugging Face API for low-latency, high-throughput inference. This integration simplifies model deployment, enabling developers to leverage high-performance inference without managing underlying infrastructure.
